sentiment.reasoning: A 10% drop in new customer orders suggests weakening demand and potential future revenue headwinds.

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in regional revenue points to localized demand issues or competitive pressures.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
